visualizations.title: Complete Number System Hierarchy
visualizations.description: The full structure showing how real numbers encompass all previous number sets.

steps.explanation: Real Numbers: the complete set of all rational and irrational numbers
Rational Numbers: numbers with terminating or repeating decimals
Non-terminating, non-repeating decimals like √2, π, and e
No gaps exist on the real number line; between any two reals lie infinitely many more
